issues.description: Trigger should be 'OnKO' not 'OnAttacked'. The effect activates when the character would be KO'd (defeated in battle), not when attacked.
Action type 'FlipLife' is incorrect. The card adds a Life card to hand, which should be 'DrawCard' (drawing from Life cards). FlipLife converts Life cards to damage, which is the opposite effect.
Missing 'optional':true to reflect the 'you may' clause in the card text.
